message:
add plugin MCP config discovery and session integration

Plugins can provide MCP server configs via .mcp.json files and/or
inline mcpServers in the manifest. Server names are prefixed with
plugin_<name>_ for downstream namespacing. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} is
expanded in raw JSON before env-var expansion to avoid conflicts.
Plugin MCP configs merge as a base layer that CLI/project can shadow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
